changeLog: Startup update check. On launch MCAssistant asynchronously fetches the MC-Scripts ReaPack index and, if a newer version is published, shows a confirm dialog: 现在更新 opens the ReaPack browser filtered to MCAssistant, 以后再说 remembers that version so it won't nag again until an even newer one ships. The check is non-blocking and fails silently. Fetch falls back across mirrors (raw.githubusercontent then jsDelivr CDN) so it works whether or not REAPER's curl has a proxy. New module: update.lua.
